title: Ogma Configuration
description: Configuration for a ogma project (.ogma.jsonc or .ogma.json)

ogma.description: Version of ogma that last successfully processed this project (auto-managed by ogma)

input.description: Path to the main .ogma file (for single-paper projects)

papers.description: List of papers to build (for multi-paper projects)

output.description: Output filename stem (no extension). Defaults to the input filename stem

tests.description: Test roots — checked by 'ogma check' but not built by 'ogma build'

dimensions.description: User-declared conceptual dimensions (e.g. 'Population'). Each name must match [A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]* and is treated as an opaque base dimension; conceptual dimensions cannot be combined with SI dimensions or each other.
